description: Specifies a point on a polygon edge by edge index and position ratio. Used to define endpoints on sheet edges for wireframe operations.
utility: Define a point on a polygon edge by index and ratio

arguments.name: edgeIndex
arguments.description: Edge number (1-based index of the polygon edge)

arguments.name: ratio
arguments.description: Position along the edge (0 to 1, where 0 is the start and 1 is the end)
